mapper.insert: insert into message (user_id, title, content, type, is_read, related_id, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{type}, #{isRead}, #{relatedId}, now())
mapper.select: select id, user_id, title, content, type, is_read, related_id, create_time from message where user_id = #{userId} order by is_read asc, create_time desc
select count(*) from message where user_id = #{userId} and is_read = 0
mapper.update: update message set is_read = 1 where user_id = #{userId} and is_read = 0
mapper.select: select id, user_id, title, content, type, is_read, related_id, create_time from message where id = #{id} limit 1
